scope: 4 batches: O (member-home class hero card + member stats expansion), P (Class.maxRankId schema + booking enforcement), Q (Class.coachUserId FK schema + UI swap), R (sign-in speed audit + final verify + push). Schema migrations staged but NOT auto-applied. Pinned baseline: 4 tests must not grow.

stories.title: Batch O: #9 Class hero card on /member/home + #11 member stats expansion
acceptanceCriteria: /member/home renders a 'Next class' hero card at the top showing the next ClassInstance the member is subscribed to (or the next public class if none subscribed) with class name, time, coach, and a tap-through to /member/schedule
If no upcoming class within 7 days, the hero card shows a friendly empty state with a CTA to /member/schedule

/member/profile (or /member/progress) gains a new stats block beyond the existing thisWeek/thisMonth/thisYear/streak: shows attendance-by-class (top 3 classes attended, count each) AND average classes per week over last 8 weeks
All data sourced from existing /api/member/me endpoint (extend it; no new endpoint)
Demo-tenant fallback gracefully renders the hero card with mock data
Vitest test for the new attendance-by-class aggregation logic
npm run build passes

stories.title: Batch P: #20 maxRank gating on class booking
acceptanceCriteria: Migration 20260428000009_class_max_rank staged (NOT auto-applied): Class.maxRankId String? FK to RankSystem with onDelete: SetNull
POST /api/coach/instances/[id]/register (and any other booking endpoints) reject 403 with clear message when member's current rank.order > class.maxRank.order
Class CRUD UI in /dashboard/timetable gains a 'Max rank' select alongside the existing 'Required rank' select; both are optional
When neither maxRank nor requiredRank is set, behaviour unchanged (backward-compatible)
Schema treats unranked members (no MemberRank) as eligible — they fail closed only against requiredRank, not maxRank
Vitest test for the rank.order comparison logic (member rank > maxRank rejected, equal allowed, less allowed, no rank allowed)
npm run build passes

stories.title: Batch Q: #21 Coach FK on Class (replace coachName string)
acceptanceCriteria: Migration 20260428000010_class_coach_user staged (NOT auto-applied): Class.coachUserId String? FK to User with onDelete: SetNull. Class.coachName remains for backward compat (no data drop)

Class CRUD UI in /dashboard/timetable: 'Coach' field becomes a select backed by tenant's User list (filtered to roles owner/coach/admin); free-text coachName remains as fallback when coachUserId is null
GET endpoints that return class data include coach: { id, name } (resolved via FK) when coachUserId is set, falling back to coachName string
Display layer (member-side schedule, coach dashboard, hero card from US-401) shows the resolved coach name without the consumer caring whether it came from FK or string
Vitest test for the coach resolution helper (FK wins over string when both present; string used when FK null; null when both absent)
npm run build passes

stories.title: Batch Q-cont: #10 Sign-in speed audit
acceptanceCriteria: Audit /api/auth/[...nextauth] credential authorize() callback for sequential awaits that can be parallelised (e.g. fetching User+Member in series when one would suffice)
Audit login page: branding fetch from /api/tenant/[slug] uses AbortController to drop stale fetches if the user types fast or navigates away
If a P50 latency improvement >100ms is realistic, implement it and document the measurement; if not, log findings to docs/SIGN-IN-SPEED-AUDIT.md and close
No regression in existing magic-link or password flows (existing tests pass)
npm run build passes

stories.title: Final verification + push
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build passes (zero TS errors)
npm test ≤ 4 pinned baseline failures (no new failures)
Per-batch commits pushed to origin/main
2 staged migrations 20260428000009 / 20260428000010 present but NOT auto-applied
Architect verification approved (STANDARD tier — UI + non-auth schema additions)
All previous stories US-401..US-404 have passes:true
